{"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}], "description": "### Impact
Several denial-of-service issues were identified in `go-git` when parsing maliciously crafted Git repository data.

An attacker may craft a malicious `.pack`, `.idx` or loose objects that causes an application using an affected version of `go-git` to panic or consume excessive resources.

This can lead to denial of service in applications that use `go-git` to clone, fetch, open, or otherwise process untrusted repositories or Git object data.

Exploitation requires the ability to alter read-only files such as `.pack` or `.idx` from the local repository's `.git/objects/pack/` directory. Alternatively, the user would need to be interacting with a malicious remote server, which is not recommended and exposes users to a broader class of security risks beyond this issue.

### Patches
Users should upgrade to a patched version in order to mitigate this vulnerability. Versions prior to `v5` are likely to be affected, users are recommended to upgrade to a supported `go-git` version.

### Credits
go-git thanks @kodareef5, @AyushParkara and @N0zoM1z0 for reporting this in four separate reports. 🙇", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-w5pp-99ch-qj29", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-29T19:43:27Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-w5pp-99ch-qj29", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-w5pp-99ch-qj29"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-05-29T19:43:27Z", "references": ["https://github.com/go-git/go-git/security/advisories/GHSA-w5pp-99ch-qj29", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-w5pp-99ch-qj29"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/go-git/go-git/security-advisories/GHSA-w5pp-99ch-qj29", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/go-git/go-git", "summary": "go-git: Malformed Git object data may cause panics or resource exhaustion", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-29T19:43:29Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-w5pp-99ch-qj29", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "5.19.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/go-git/go-git/v5"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 5.19.0"}, {"first_patched_version": "6.0.0-alpha.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/go-git/go-git/v6"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 6.0.0-alpha.3"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: go-git: Malformed Git object data may cause panics or resource exhaustion
